intro: Gymnacranthera murtonii is a tropical plant species, specifically a tree, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Gymnacranthera murtonii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Gymnacranthera murtonii is often prepared as a decoction or infused in tea form to take advantage of its health benefits.
